questionHtml: State how type I diabetes should be treated to avoid harmful health consequences of the condition.
markschemeHtml:
1. inject insulin / monitoring blood glucose / devices that release insulin;
  2. decrease consumption of sugars/CHO / diet modification;
  3. increase exercise;
  4. keep weight in healthy range;

meta.title: State how type I diabetes should be treated to avoid harmful health consequences of the condition.
breadcrumbLabels: D3.3.4. Physiological changes that form the basis of type 1 and type 2 diabetes
